title: tarenna hirsuta
intro: Tarenna hirsuta, also known as the hairy tarenna or hairy tarenna plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Tarenna hirsuta include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In various parts of Asia, Tarenna hirsuta is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used in traditional herbal medicine in the form of tea or poultices.
